final_prompt.prompt:
Create an employee ID badge for 字节跳动 (ByteDance), front and back views.

Style/medium: needs a "corporate tech badge" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple employee ID minimalism, Google campus badge design language, 2010s Silicon Valley startup ID card conventions; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include front and back views of the badge
Subject: must include the 字节跳动 brand identity elements
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a photorealistic, authentic badge photography atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include realistic plastic/laminate badge material with lanyard attachment
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be photorealistic, must show both front and back sides
Avoid: cartoonish or illustrated styles
